photo_prompt: {character_name}, {appearance_anchor}, {scene_description}, {city}, {weather_description}, {lighting}, outfit: {outfit_summary}, style: cinematic lifestyle photography, realistic, high detail
video_prompt: Vertical short video of {character_name} in {city}: {scene_description}. Lighting: {lighting}. Outfit: {outfit_summary}. Motion: subtle natural movement, realistic travel ambiance.
